---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# padaptR

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The reason for writing padaptR is to realize a tool which makes it easier to work with data downloaded from PADAPT (Pannonian Database Of Plant Traits). They also have a website: https://padapt.eu/en

The original authors of this database are Sonkoly et. al., their manuscript is avaiable at https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-023-02619-9


## Installation

You can install the development version of padaptR from [GitHub](https://github.com/dominiksutac/padaptR) with:

``` {r, eval = FALSE}
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("dominiksutac/padaptR")
```

```{r example}
library(padaptR)
```
